{{CargoRelic
|name=Monkey Medal
|class_id=20059
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The Yunnan Snub-nosed Monkey Conservation Medal is an honorary award established to recognize individuals and organizations that have made outstanding contributions to the conservation of the Yunnan snub-nosed monkey. The medal is instituted by the Yunnan Green Environment Development Foundation with the aim of raising public awareness about this species.
|fame=30
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail RUSH +20<br>Per 5 Minions Cloned, Snail ATK +2<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss2=Snail RUSH +40<br>Per 5 Minions Cloned, Snail ATK +4<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss3=Snail RUSH +60<br>Per 5 Minions Cloned, Snail ATK +6<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss4=Snail RUSH +60<br>Per 5 Minions Cloned, Snail ATK +6<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss7=Snail RUSH +60<br>Per 5 Minions Cloned, Snail ATK +6<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
